name: shipwright
description: Claude Code and Codex skills for turning trends into products and shipping trustworthy GitHub projects.

website.notes: Prototype landing page and analyzer demo; executable audit workflows live under skills/.

skills.name: github-radar
skills.use_when: Scanning GitHub Trending, Explore, or hot repositories for builder opportunities.

skills.name: trend-to-product
skills.use_when: Turning a hot repository, trend, or competitor into a differentiated MVP.

skills.name: idea-to-prd
skills.use_when: Converting a rough product idea into a lean PRD.

skills.name: prd-to-issues
skills.use_when: Breaking a PRD into GitHub-ready issues.

skills.name: launch-readiness
skills.use_when: Auditing a GitHub project before public promotion.

skills.name: browser-launch-audit
skills.use_when: Verifying a web app or demo URL in a real browser before shipping.

skills.name: readme-install-audit
skills.use_when: Testing whether a first-time user can install and use a repo from the README.

skills.name: agent-output-review
skills.use_when: Reviewing AI-generated work for hallucinated claims, fake-complete features, and missing verification.

skills.name: github-release-checklist
skills.use_when: Preparing repo metadata, release notes, launch copy, and final release blockers.

skills.name: workflow-to-skill
skills.use_when: Turning a repeated agent workflow into an installable skill.
